title: triticum vulgare convar. dicoccum
intro: Triticum vulgare convar. dicoccum, also known as two-rowed barley or Scotch barley, is a type of cultivated barley plant that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its ability to aid digestion and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Triticum vulgare convar. dicoccum include lowering cholesterol levels, reducing the risk of heart disease, and promoting a healthy gut. The herbal preparations of this plant are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems and skin conditions.
